attributes.action: Ban any  animal slaughter done while still conscious.
attributes.background: There has been undercover recordings of animals being hacked to death whilst still fully conscious yet some vets and RSPCA red tractor seem to be ignoring this if more people knew or saw the videos they would be uproar

rejection.details:
Your petition appears to be in essence a duplicate of one that is already open - which you may wish to read and then sign:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762122
